items.title: Canadian from hantavirus-hit cruise ship tests positive
items.summary: The individual is one of four former passengers on the MV Hondius isolating on Vancouver Island, British Columbia.

items.title: How are countries responding to hantavirus?
items.summary: The UK, US and EU are asking all citizens returning home from the virus-hit MV Hondius to self-isolate for about six weeks.

items.title: How worried should we be about hantavirus?
items.summary: Passengers potentially exposed to hantavirus are being repatriated, so what is the risk to the wider public?

items.title: French national shows symptoms on return from hantavirus-hit ship
items.summary: Five passengers of the MV Hondius will be quarantined in Paris "until further notice", France's prime minister says.

items.title: Worldwide race to trace passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
items.summary: About 12 countries have so far been linked to the hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, as the UN health agency confirms at least five cases.

items.title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship on way to Canary Islands after three evacuated
items.summary: A British man is among three evacuees sent to the Netherlands after displaying symptoms while aboard the MV Hondius.

items.title: Hantavirus survivor says sickness was like 'hell on earth'
items.summary: Two survivors who caught the hantavirus years earlier told the BBC they both felt lucky to be alive.

items.title: What is the cruise ship hantavirus and how does it spread?
items.summary: The Andes strain of the virus has been confirmed in some passengers, which can rarely be passed from person to person.

items.title: What is the Andes Strain of Hantavirus?
items.summary: The Andes strain of the virus has been confirmed in two passengers who were taken to South Africa, according to the country's health minister

items.title: Hantavirus strain that spreads between humans found in cruise ship passengers
items.summary: South Africa's health ministry said the Andes strain of the virus was found in two confirmed cases linked to the outbreak.

items.title: Cruise passengers tell of life on board stranded ship after hantavirus outbreak
items.summary: While passengers onboard the MV Hondius say the situation is calm, they face days at sea as officials warn the disease may have spread.

items.title: Hantavirus may have spread between passengers on cruise ship, WHO says
items.summary: Two cases of the virus, which rarely spreads between humans, have been confirmed on the ship, and three people have died.

items.title: Cruise ship’s hantavirus outbreak puts researchers in uncharted territory
items.summary: Questions about the culprit virus and its route of spread remain as health officials make plans for stranded passengers
